title: Request for Extended Evaluation / Rebuttal of Feasibility Denial
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: Assigned Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor (VRC)
VA Regional Office

Subject: Request for Extended Evaluation / Rebuttal of Feasibility Denial (38 C.F.R. § 21.57)
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

Dear Counselor,

I am writing to formally rebut the determination that achieving a vocational goal is not reasonably feasible for me under Chapter 31 due to the severity of my service-connected disabilities.

I hold a disability rating of {{ratingPercentage}}. My proposed vocational objective is {{proposedGoal}}.

Under 38 C.F.R. § 21.57, the counselor should resolve reasonable doubts in favor of the veteran's feasibility. If there is uncertainty regarding feasibility, the VA should authorize an Extended Evaluation under 38 C.F.R. § 21.74 to assess capabilities rather than issuing an immediate feasibility denial (Resolved Doubt: {{resolvedDoubt}}, Extended Evaluation Offered: {{extendedEvalOffered}}).

Additionally, I submit the following facts supporting feasibility:
- Medical support: Doctor Letter Available: {{hasDoctorLetter}}.
- Personal Remarks: {{personalFeasibilityRemarks}}.

I request that my file be placed in Extended Evaluation status to formally evaluate my rehabilitation capacity over a structured period, or that my proposed plan be authorized.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
